parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'ok',summary:$json.summary,results:$json.results,timestamp:$json.timestamp,analysis:'Gemini analysis running async - check gda_e2e_reports table'}) }}

parameters.query: =CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_e2e_reports (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, run_at TIMESTAMPTZ, pass_rate VARCHAR(10), passed INT, failed INT, errors INT, total INT, analysis TEXT, results JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()); INSERT INTO gda_e2e_reports (run_at,pass_rate,passed,failed,errors,total,analysis,results) VALUES ('{{ $('Build Gemini Prompt').first().json.timestamp }}','{{ $('Build Gemini Prompt').first().json.summary.pass_rate }}',{{ $('Build Gemini Prompt').first().json.summary.passed }},{{ $('Build Gemini Prompt').first().json.summary.failed }},{{ $('Build Gemini Prompt').first().json.summary.errors }},{{ $('Build Gemini Prompt').first().json.summary.total }},'{{ (($json.content&&Array.isArray($json.content)?$json.content[0].text:$json.text)||'Analysis unavailable').replace(/'/g,"''").substring(0,5000) }}','{{ JSON.stringify($('Build Gemini Prompt').first().json.results).replace(/'/g,"''") }}');

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({type:'e2e', pass_rate: $('Run E2E Tests').first().json.summary ? $('Run E2E Tests').first().json.summary.pass_rate : '??', passed: $('Run E2E Tests').first().json.summary ? $('Run E2E Tests').first().json.summary.passed : 0, failed: $('Run E2E Tests').first().json.summary ? $('Run E2E Tests').first().json.summary.failed : 0, errors: $('Run E2E Tests').first().json.summary ? $('Run E2E Tests').first().json.summary.errors : 0}) }}
